commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=9103d85a3a35f1465f2246e16db4c85d2ff84551)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds detection, prompts, backups, and tests for resetting undecryptable non-main legacy OAuth sidecar auth so affected agents fall back to main auth.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR finding: source inspection shows the PR fallback delegates to confirmAutoFix, while current repair sequencing passes only an auto-approving confirmAutoFix. I did not run the patched branch because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real behavior proof plus a maintainer-visible fix for the interactive-only auth reset gate; this is not a safe repair-lane candidate while proof is missing.

target.title: feat (auth): offer interactive repair for undecryptable legacy agent OAuth sidecars
target.body:
## Summary
- detect undecryptable legacy OAuth sidecars for non-main agent auth stores during doctor/update auth health checks
- show affected non-main agent ids and auth/sidecar paths, explain that choosing no preserves custom per-agent auth, and prompt with a default-no reset confirmation
- when accepted, move affected non-main `auth-profiles.json` and unshared legacy sidecars aside with `.bak.<timestamp>` backups so agents fall back to main auth
- keep main auth untouched by the reset path and keep non-interactive runs warning-only with an explicit interactive `openclaw doctor` recovery command

## Tests
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.commands.config.ts src/commands/doctor-auth-oauth-sidecar.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/commands/doctor-prompter.ts src/commands/doctor-auth-oauth-sidecar.ts src/commands/doctor-auth-oauth-sidecar.test.ts`

## Notes
- Full import/typecheck-style checks are blocked in this checkout by missing local packages such as `@openclaw/proxyline` and `@earendil-works/*`; the focused command test suite and formatting checks pass.
target.author: bdjben

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
